name: Spinach and Artichoke Casseroles:
recipeIngredient: 1 package Artichoke hearts, frozen (9 oz), defrosted
3 packages Chopped spinach, frozen (10 oz), defrosted
1/3 cup Parmesan or Romano cheese, fresh grated
recipeInstructions:
Serves 10
1. If using frozen artichokes, cook according to package instructions. Do not overcook.
2. Drain the artichokes and place them at the bottom of a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Squeeze out excess moisture from the spinach and layer it on top of the artichokes.
4. In an electric mixer, blend cream cheese, mayonnaise, and butter or oil until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in milk until combined. Spread this mixture over the spinach.
6. Sprinkle with pepper and grated cheese.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
8. If refrigerating before baking, slightly increase the baking time.
From: "The Frugal Gourmet" by Jeff Smith, Ballantine Books, 1984. Shared by June Hoffman 3/93
